prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial opens on a very dark title card. Large, dim block lettering reads “SIMPLE PIMPLE CONTROL,” though the words are low-contrast and partly hard to see.

It then cuts to a brightly colored product shot. A red box of **Stridex** is held toward the camera, filling most of the frame. Readable packaging text includes “SUPER SIZE PADS,” “STRIDEX,” “55 PADS,” and “MAXIMUM STRENGTH.” The background is a vivid green, textured or patterned surface, and a person in a blue/purple striped shirt is partly visible behind the box, mostly obscured by the product.

Later, the setting changes to a bathroom or grooming area. A young male-presenting person is shown in profile at a mirror, touching or wiping his cheek with one hand as if applying a facial pad. Toiletry items and a sink/mirror setup are visible around him. A yellow on-screen warning at the bottom reads: **“USE ONLY AS DIRECTED.”** The brand name appears faintly or partially on the mirror/cabinet area, but the exact detail is not fully clear.

A brief blurry close-up follows. The image is out of focus, showing skin-toned and red/orange shapes with a pale object near the top; it is not clear exactly what action or object is being shown in this sampled frame.

The commercial then moves into a rapid graphic/product montage. Close-up angled shots of Stridex packaging appear against a dark background. A turquoise/green package is shown with readable text including **“STRIDEX,” “WITH ALOE,”** and **“SENSITIVE SKIN.”** The product boxes are cropped and tilted, creating a dynamic, layered visual effect.

Another product close-up shows a purple package. Readable text includes **“SUPER SIZE PADS”** in raised-looking orange letters and part of the phrase **“CLEANS·TREATS…”** near the Stridex logo. The box is again shown at an angle, tightly cropped so only part of the brand name is visible.

Near the end, the young male-presenting person appears again against a plain black background, wearing a blue and purple striped polo-style shirt. A large **Stridex** logo panel is positioned behind him. He faces the camera and gestures with his hands in a presenting pose. At the lower left, white text reads **“SIMPLE PIMPLE,”** partially visible due to cropping.

The final sampled frame shows a layered transition or composite: the presenter, the Stridex logo, and the phrase **“SIMPLE PIMPLE”** appear overlapped, with a green patterned band along the bottom. The image looks like a dissolve or graphic overlay rather than a stable single shot.
